title: Pithecellobium acle
taxonomy: Pithecellobium acle is classified as a species of legume in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Pithecellobium and is a part of the order Fabales. The plant is native to the Americas and is also known as the "Guamachil" tree. Further classification includes being in the subfamily Faboideae, and tribe Ingeae. The species classification for Pithecellobium acle is still being researched and may be subject to change.
